name: genesic
description: GeneSiC Semiconductor is a leading innovator in Silicon Carbide (SiC) and Gallium Nitride (GaN) power semiconductors, offering high-performance devices for electric vehicles, renewable energy, aerospace, and industrial applications.
longDescription: GeneSiC Semiconductor has established itself as a pioneer in wide bandgap semiconductor technology, specializing in high-voltage SiC MOSFETs, SiC Schottky diodes, and GaN power devices. With a focus on ruggedness and reliability, GeneSiC products are designed to operate in the most demanding environments, from deep space missions to high-temperature automotive applications. The company's proprietary trench-gate SiC MOSFET technology delivers industry-leading performance with low on-resistance and superior switching characteristics. GeneSiC's comprehensive product portfolio serves markets including EV/HEV, solar/wind energy, aerospace, defense, and industrial power conversion.

coreProducts.name: SiC MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: High-voltage SiC MOSFETs with trench-gate technology

coreProducts.name: SiC Schottky Diodes
coreProducts.description: Zero reverse recovery SiC diodes for high-efficiency rectification

coreProducts.name: GaN HEMTs
coreProducts.description: High-frequency GaN power devices for compact designs

coreProducts.name: Power Modules
coreProducts.description: Integrated SiC power modules for complete solutions

seoTitle: GeneSiC Semiconductor | SiC MOSFETs, GaN HEMTs, Power Modules | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of GeneSiC SiC MOSFETs, GaN HEMTs, and power modules. Technical support for EV, aerospace, and industrial applications.

faqs.question: What makes GeneSiC SiC MOSFETs unique?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC SiC MOSFET differentiators: (1) Trench-gate technology - Proprietary design for low Rds(on). (2) High voltage - Industry-leading 3300V rating. (3) Ruggedness - Enhanced short-circuit withstand capability. (4) Temperature - 200°C maximum junction temperature. (5) Aerospace heritage - Proven in space missions. (6) Quality - AS9100 certified manufacturing. (7) Support - Comprehensive design resources. GeneSiC combines performance with extreme reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose GeneSiC for highest voltage ratings and aerospace-grade reliability.

faqs.question: What voltage ratings does GeneSiC offer?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC voltage ratings: (1) SiC MOSFETs - 650V to 3300V. (2) SiC Diodes - 600V to 3300V. (3) GaN HEMTs - 100V to 650V. (4) Modules - 1200V to 3300V. (5) High voltage - Industry-leading 3300V devices. (6) Automotive - AEC-Q101 qualified to 1700V. (7) Aerospace - Radiation-tolerant options. GeneSiC offers the widest voltage range in the industry.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC provides SiC devices from 650V to 3300V for any application.

faqs.question: Are GeneSiC devices suitable for aerospace applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC is aerospace-qualified: (1) AS9100 - Aerospace quality certification. (2) Radiation tolerance - Tested for space missions. (3) Temperature - Extended range for harsh environments. (4) Reliability - Proven in satellite applications. (5) Heritage - Flight-proven devices. (6) Screening - Enhanced screening available. (7) Documentation - Full aerospace traceability. GeneSiC is the trusted choice for aerospace power electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC is ideal for aerospace with AS9100 certification and radiation tolerance.

faqs.question: What applications are best suited for GeneSiC GaN HEMTs?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC GaN HEMT applications: (1) High-frequency SMPS - Up to several MHz. (2) Aerospace - Lightweight, compact designs. (3) Motor drives - High-speed servo systems. (4) RF power - Radar and communications. (5) EV charging - Onboard chargers. (6) Industrial - Compact power supplies. (7) Defense - Rugged, reliable operation. GeneSiC GaN excels in high-frequency, size-constrained applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use GeneSiC GaN for high-frequency applications requiring compact size.

faqs.question: Does GeneSiC offer automotive-qualified devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, GeneSiC offers AEC-Q101 qualified devices: (1) Automotive SiC MOSFETs - Full AEC-Q101 qualification. (2) PPAP support - Production part approval process. (3) Voltage range - 650V to 1700V for EV. (4) Traction inverters - High-power EV applications. (5) OBC - Onboard charger solutions. (6) DC-DC - HV-LV converters. (7) Support - Dedicated automotive FAE team. GeneSiC supports the full range of EV applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC automotive SiC MOSFETs are ideal for EV powertrain applications.

faqs.question: What design support does GeneSiC provide?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC design support: (1) Reference designs - EV, solar, aerospace applications. (2) SPICE models - Accurate device simulation. (3) Evaluation kits - Hardware for testing. (4) Application notes - Comprehensive design guides. (5) Thermal tools - Junction temperature calculators. (6) FAE support - Global field application engineering. (7) Training - Technical workshops. GeneSiC provides comprehensive support for successful designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Access GeneSiC's design resources; contact BeiLuo FAE for personalized support.
